name: DG Set Control Panel
shortDescription: Control panels for diesel generator sets with manual & automatic options.
description: Custom-designed Diesel Generator (DG) set control panels that allow manual or automatic control, diagnostics, and protective shielding of generator systems. Configured with premium relays, meters, and switchgear for reliable operations.

specs.name: Meters
specs.value: Digital Voltmeter, Ammeter, Frequency, Hour Counter

features: Auto-start and auto-stop sequencing
Generator parameter protection (low oil pressure, high water temp, over/under speed)
High quality wiring with ferrule labeling for easy servicing
Integrated emergency stop system

name: Electric Control Panel
shortDescription: General-purpose industrial and commercial electrical control boards.
description: Highly durable and compliant electrical control panels fabricated for distribution, machinery operation, and utility control. Engineered with high-conductivity copper busbars and premium switchgear components.
features: Custom compartmentalized designs as per site requirements
Short-circuit testing certification up to 50kA
Powder coated finish for superior corrosion resistance
Excellent thermal ventilation design

name: HT LT Panel
shortDescription: High Tension and Low Tension power distribution panels.
description: High and Low Tension switchgear panels designed for central power distribution from electrical substations to plant utilities. Fitted with certified vacuum circuit breakers (VCBs) and air circuit breakers (ACBs) to safeguard load paths.
features: Vacuum interrupters for HT grids ensuring absolute safety
Intelligent microprocessor-based overcurrent, short-circuit, and earth faults protective relays
Busbar trunking compatibility
Mechanical safety interlocks preventing misoperation

name: APFC Panel
shortDescription: Three Phase Automatic Power Factor Correction Panels.
description: APFC Panels designed to automatically switch capacitor steps based on dynamic inductive loads. Effectively corrects power factor close to unity (0.99) to eliminate reactive energy penalties from electricity companies.

specs.name: Reactors
specs.value: 7% detuned copper/aluminium reactors for harmonic mitigation

features: Maintains average PF above 0.98, maximizing efficiency
Detuned filters block harmful harmonics, extending capacitor life
Thermostatically controlled exhaust fan cooling systems
Overcurrent and overvoltage protective trips

name: PCC Panel (Power Control Center)
shortDescription: Main Power Control Centers for heavy B2B grid loads.
description: Power Control Center (PCC) panels configured to distribute power to major sub-panels and heavy machinery grids. Fully compartmentalized design using motorized switchgear to support stable operations.

specs.name: Breakers
specs.value: Air Circuit Breakers (ACB) or heavy duty MCCBs

features: Rigid busbar structures structured for high mechanical stress resistance
High conductivity copper contacts
Comprehensive digital power monitoring meters with communication interfaces
Form 4 compartmentalization separating switchgear, busbars, and cable connections

name: Fire Hydrant Panel
shortDescription: Fire fighting pump control panels with automatic pressure triggers.
description: Safety compliant control panels for fire hydrant and sprinkler pump systems. Activates jockey pumps, main hydrant pumps, and standby diesel engine pumps automatically upon grid pressure drops.

specs.name: Standard Complied
specs.value: National Building Code (NBC) / Local Fire Authority rules

specs.name: Pump Configurations
specs.value: Jockey Pump + Main Electric Pump + Standby Diesel Pump

specs.name: Control Logic
specs.value: Pressure switch triggers, manual test keys

features: Automatic switchover from electric pump to diesel pump on power failure
Siren alarm alert triggers on pressure failure or pipe bursts
Dual supply power input paths with auto-changeovers
Corrosion-resistant red powder coated cabinet finish

name: MCC Panel (Motor Control Center)
shortDescription: Motor Control Centers with VFDs and Soft Starters.
description: Compartmentalized MCC panels designed to operate multiple induction motors. Incorporates soft starters, variable frequency drives (VFDs), and standard starter units for smooth starting torque and precise speed control.

specs.name: Coordination
specs.value: Type-2 coordination as per IS/IEC standards

features: Modular drawer configurations for swift feeder replacement
Thermal overload protection, single phasing preventers, phase reversal trips
Forced cooling systems using premium cooling fans
Padlockable breaker handles for maintenance safety

name: Power Distribution Panel
description: Robust and reliable Low Tension (LT) sub-distribution panel boards constructed to route electrical circuits to diverse lighting, utility sockets, and small motor loads on plant floors.

specs.name: Switchgear components
specs.value: Molded Case Circuit Breakers (MCCB) / MCB / ELCB

features: Compact space-saving wall-mounting or floor-standing designs
Integrated earth-leakage trips to prevent electrical shocks
Highly organized cable trays and neutral/earth links inside
IP42 / IP52 ingress ratings for dust protection

name: PLC Electric Control Panel
shortDescription: Intelligent automated control panels using PLCs & HMIs.
description: State-of-the-art Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) panels designed to manage complex automation logic, instrument readouts, and pneumatic/hydraulic operations. Fully integrated HMI displays provide active operator monitoring.
features: Custom HMI mimic layout designs for easy operations
Opto-isolated terminals protecting PLC inputs from voltage surges
UPS backup battery power for control logics
Active process alarms and event logs saved

name: Amf Distribution Panel
shortDescription: Automatic transfer panels switching generator utility lines.
description: Amf Distribution Panels (and Automatic AMF Panels) designed to handle utility line failure. Triggers standby diesel generators instantly and switches load switches to maintain continuous power supply.

specs.name: System Status indicators
specs.value: Mains ON, Gen ON, Gen Fault, Auto Charger ON

features: Fail-safe mechanical interlock prevents double line feeding
Smart battery chargers maintain standby generator starting power
Integrated emergency start override switch
Phase-failure and voltage fluctuation sensing circuits

name: Three Phase DG Synchronization Panel
shortDescription: Generator load sharing and auto synchronization systems.
description: Designed to synchronize and parallel multiple diesel generator sets automatically. Optimizes fuel efficiency by engaging generators progressively as power demand scale changes on factory grids.

specs.name: Synchronization Parameters
specs.value: Voltage matching, Phase angle matching, Frequency matching

specs.name: Load Sharing type
specs.value: Active kW / Reactive kVAR sharing grids

specs.name: Switching breakers
specs.value: Motorized ACBs / MCCBs with shunt trip coils

features: Automatic load-shedding of non-critical breakers under overload state
Saves fuel by shutting down idle generators during low-load intervals
Protective reverse power trips protecting offline generator units
Automatic phase alignment checks

name: Copper & GI Earthing Systems
shortDescription: Chemical ground electrodes, copper strips, and pit covers.
description: High-conductive grounding systems designed to discharge voltage surges and short-circuits. Incorporates copper-bonded electrodes, pure copper strips, and moisture-retaining chemical backfills.

specs.name: Materials
specs.value: Solid Copper, Copper-Bonded Steel, GI Electodes

specs.name: Refill Compound
specs.value: Bentonite / Carbon based moisture retaining eco-powder

features: High corrosion resistance providing 15+ years service life
Saves space over traditional salt/charcoal pits
Maintains low soil resistance under dry weather profiles
Tested to meet IS 3043 and IEEE grounding requirements

name: Wire and Cables
shortDescription: Polycab, Havells, RR Kabel, and certified power cables.
description: Authorized dealership of industrial power cables, flexible wires, and instrument control lines. Available in single-core and multi-core configurations complying with safety fire standards.

specs.name: Dealership Brands
specs.value: Polycab, Havells, RR Kabel, KEI, Finolex

specs.name: Insulation Grade
specs.value: PVC / XLPE / FR-LSH (Fire Retardant Low Smoke Halogen)

features: FR-LSH coating resists high temperatures and does not release toxic fumes during fire faults
High dielectric insulation strength
Armored cables protect conductors from mechanical damage
High conductivity minimizes line losses

name: Transformers
shortDescription: Distribution & Power Transformers for industrial step-down setups.
description: B2B distribution transformers engineered to step down high line utility voltages (11kV / 33kV) to low factory voltages (433V / 415V). Fully certified for minimal load loss and high dielectric insulation oil strength.

specs.name: Tap Changer
specs.value: Off-Circuit Tap Switch / On-Load Tap Changer (OLTC)

features: Corrugated cooling radiators ensuring optimum oil cooling rates
Buchholz relay and oil temp gauges warning against internal gas arcs
Minimal core loss matching BEE star efficiency norms
Robust pressure-tested mild steel oil tank
